title: callisteris aggregata
side_effects: Callisteris aggregata can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heartbeat, dizziness, and nausea due to its high levels of toxic compounds. In severe cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and even respiratory problems. Improper preparation and dosage of callisteris aggregata extracts can also cause digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Furthermore, its high levels of psychoactive compounds can lead to anxiety, insomnia, and hallucinations if used excessively.
